sub_pixel_system.notes: Build engine game; sub-pixel details not documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Moonshine Power-up
special_mechanics.description: Grants increased movement speed for brief duration; resets both drunk meter and gut meter upon expiration

special_mechanics.name: Drunk State
special_mechanics.description: Caused by alcohol consumption; character movements become erratic and unresponsive to keyboard input. At maximum intoxication, character falls down and becomes defenseless. Effects wear off over time measured in minutes.

special_mechanics.name: Gut Meter / Flatulence
special_mechanics.description: Increased by food consumption; affects stealth by producing distinct sound, making sneaking difficult

physics_values.sound_emission: frequent fart sounds during movement when meter high

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains only gameplay mechanics documentation. No precise physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values) are documented. Build engine is used but specific physics implementation details not available in source material.
